sequence.speaker: Cpt. Walsh
text: Alrighty, welcome to your bootcampt into real honest work.  Yer training program is to first start in this lagoon. Then, ye'll move onto the bay. After that you might end up catching some real fish!

sequence.speaker: Cpt. Walsh
text: The first thing ya gotta use is the old fish finder.

sequence.speaker: Cpt. Walsh
text: Press E and it'll show you where the fish is, if it's in front of ye.

sequence.speaker: Cpt. Walsh
text: Once you've got a lock, cast your net with a good arc.

sequence.speaker: Cpt. Walsh
text: And whatever you do — stay away from the red one.

sequence.speaker: Cpt. Walsh
text: Ah, splendid! If you see the red dot, that's a fish. Cast your net at it and reel it in!

sequence.speaker: Cpt. Walsh
text: Now, here's an old fisherman's tip: You can't jus' use the finder and then cast the net, by the time the net gets down thar these little skippers'dve bailed fer yonder. You gotta use it in several places, understand where the fish _WILL_ go, then cast yer net based off of that. Ye gotta build an image in yer mind of where they be headin. But also, ya got limited daylight. So you'll need to hone your own mind's 'fish sense', yes sir...
